heading: What's Included
subheading: Five disciplines, every level — all sessions include a detailed lesson plan.

offerings.title: Piano
offerings.description: Build a foundation in technique, reading, and theory, or develop the intermediate skills to play the music you love.

offerings.title: Marching Percussion
offerings.description: Snare, tenors, and bass — chops, technique, and the rep to be competition-ready in any drumline.

offerings.title: Keyboard Percussion
offerings.description: Marimba, vibraphone, and bells. Four-mallet technique, sight-reading, and musicality.

offerings.title: World Latin Percussion
offerings.description: Congas, bongos, timbales, and hand percussion — grooves and traditions from across Latin music.

offerings.title: Drumset
offerings.description: Groove, independence, and feel across rock, funk, and Latin styles for the kit player.

perks: Detailed written lesson plan every session
Lessons tailored to your level and goals
